res_extracted <- res |>
  # extract closure results
  ## step 1: Extract 'frequency'
  mutate(closure_metrics = future_map(.x = closure,
                                      .f = ~ .x$metrics,
                                      .progress = TRUE)) |>
  ## step 2: Unnest the extracted tibble |>
  unnest(closure_metrics) |>
  # extract horns
  ## step 1: Extract 'frequency'
  mutate(horns = future_pmap(.l = list(closure),
                             .f = closure_horns_analyze,
                             .progress = TRUE)) |>
  # step 2: Unnest the extracted tibble |>
  mutate(horns_metrics = future_map(.x = horns,
                                    .f = ~ .x$horns_metrics,
                                    .progress = TRUE)) |>
  unnest(horns_metrics, names_sep = "_") |>
  # drop closure
  select(-closure, -horns) |>
  # convenience for plotting
  mutate(mean = as.numeric(mean),
         sd = as.numeric(sd)) |>
  mutate(Possible = samples_all > 0,
         Horns_of_no_confidence_min = horns_metrics_min > horns_metrics_uniform,
         Horns_of_no_confidence_median = horns_metrics_median > horns_metrics_uniform,
         Horns_of_no_confidence_max = horns_metrics_max > horns_metrics_uniform)
